For example, avoid writes with    \n          large strides as they lead to partial accesses to many L2 cache lines. Speedup: 0.06664%                                                                                        \n          The access patterns for writes to compressible memory are not well suited for the L2 Compression unit. As a   \n          consequence, 23.6x the data written to the L2 cache has to be communicated to the L2 Compression unit. Try    \n          maximizing local coherence for the write operations to compressible memory. Speedup: 0.1393%                                                                                         \n          The access patterns for writes to compressible memory are not well suited for the L2 Compression unit. As a   \n          consequence, 61.7x the data written to the L2 cache has to be communicated to the L2 Compression unit. Try    \n          maximizing local coherence for the write operations to compressible memory. For example, avoid writes with    \n          large strides as they lead to partial accesses to many L2 cache lines. Instead, try accessing fewer overall   \n          cache lines by modifying many values per cache line with each warp's execution of a write operation.          \n\n    Section: Launch Statistics\n    -------------------------------- --------------- ---------------\n    Metric Name                          Metric Unit    Metric Value\n    -------------------------------- --------------- ---------------\n    Block Size                                                   512\n    Cluster Scheduling Policy                           PolicySpread\n    Cluster Size                                                   0\n    Function Cache Configuration                     CachePreferNone\n    Grid Size                                                      3\n    Registers Per Thread             register/thread              32\n    Shared Memory Configuration Size           Kbyte           16.38\n    Driver Shared Memory Per Block       Kbyte/block            1.02\n    Dynamic Shared Memory Per Block       byte/block               0\n    Static Shared Memory Per Block        byte/block              16\n    # SMs                                         SM             148\n    Stack Size                                                  1024\n    Threads                                   thread            1536\n    # TPCs                                                        74\n    Enabled TPC IDs                                              all\n    Uses Green Context                                             0\n    Waves Per SM                                                0.01\n    -------------------------------- --------------- ---------------\n\n    OPT   Est. Speedup: 0.07118%                                                                                        \n          The access patterns for writes to compressible memory are not well suited for the L2 Compression unit. As a   \n          consequence, 22.3x the data written to the L2 cache has to be communicated to the L2 Compression unit. Try    \n          maximizing local coherence for the write operations to compressible memory. For example, avoid writes with    \n          large strides as they lead to partial accesses to many L2 cache lines.
